creator: hlh@restart.be
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #3)
If my logbook is correct I was running

FreeBSD 14.0-STABLE #0 stable/14-n265953-d264ddb9c7f8 on a arm64 rockpro64 

Since then I have to recreate the ports tree and all run smoothly without this patch.
So this bug entry must be ignored.
